heading: Additional authorization for payment of United States contribution
label: 290g–14 Additional authorization for payment of United States contribution
notes: Codificationis based on section 2 of H.R. 4645, One Hundredth Congress, as reported , and enacted into law by .Section 215 of Pub. L. 94–302Pub. L. 100–461Sept. 28, 1988

children.heading: Contribution authorized
children.label: a Contribution authorized
children.text: The United States Governor of the Fund is authorized to contribute $315,000,000 to the fifth replenishment of the resources of the Fund, except that such authority shall be effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: In order to pay for the United States contribution provided for in this section, there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $315,000,000, for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
